event.title: Taylor Swift Courtside at NBA Finals Game 4
event.description: Pop superstar Taylor Swift attended Game 4 of the NBA Finals between the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs, seated courtside at Madison Square Garden as the Knicks staged a record-breaking rally.

angle: Arbi believes Taylor's lucky charm caused the Knicks' rally, now he needs her at his next chess match.
line: Arbi frantically mimics Taylor's every cheer and gesture, then scoops up her invisible "lucky charm," cramming it under his crown while cackling.

visual_direction.scene: Arbi, convinced Taylor's lucky charm is the key, bursts through the crowd, mimicking her every move with exaggerated enthusiasm, desperately trying to absorb her 'Knicks rally' magic for his upcoming chess match, all while chanting 'Arbi! Arbi! Arbi!'
visual_direction.outfit: Taylor Swift is wearing a royal blue short-sleeved t-shirt with 'NEW YORK KNICKS' printed in orange and white on the front. She has on black distressed denim shorts with rips. Her hair is styled in a messy bun or ponytail with bangs. She is wearing red lipstick and has a black crossbody bag with silver chain details. She also has a white bracelet on her left wrist.
